bento.description: Questions about applications, eligibility, entrance exams, and enrollment.

bento.title: Response Time
bento.description: We aim to reply to all inquiries within one business day.

bento.title: Scholarships Desk

bento.description: Schedule a guided tour of WCBT facilities in Jhapa.

channels.title: Phone
channels.description: 9714530056, 9714530057 for admissions and general inquiries during office hours.

channels.title: Email
channels.description: info@whitehouseeducation.edu.np — we respond within one business day.

channels.title: Visit us
channels.description: WCBT Jhapa Campus, Jhapa, Nepal. Schedule visits in advance.

channels.title: Office hours
channels.description: Sun–Fri, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM NPT. Saturday visits by appointment.

faq.question: What are your office hours?
faq.answer: Sunday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM NPT. Saturday by appointment for campus visits.

faq.question: How do I schedule a campus visit?
faq.answer: Call 9714530056 or 9714530057 or email info@whitehouseeducation.edu.np with your preferred date. We recommend visiting on weekdays.

faq.question: Can I contact via WhatsApp?
faq.answer: Yes. Message us at 9714530056 or 9714530057 for quick admissions and general inquiries during office hours.

faq.question: Where is WCBT located?
faq.answer: WCBT operates from the SBSS premises in Jhapa, Nepal. Detailed directions are shared when you schedule a visit.
